---
layout: page
title: Protocols
---

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Zooxanthellae Counts
{{< include zooxanthellae-protocol/zooxanthellae_protocol.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## PAM protocol
{{< include pam-protocol/PAM-Protocol.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Mean Intensity Gray Bleaching Analysis
{{< include MIG-protocol/MIGprotocol.qmd >}}
:::
